creative_brief: Close-up of hands exchanging fresh produce at the Brookvale hub, with families and children visible in the warm background lighting.
primary_text: Rachel Ward noticed something when she started FarmThru. The families collecting from Brookvale weren't just customers anymore. They knew which paddock their beef came from. They asked about the soil health on her Kempsey farm. They brought their kids to meet the farmers at weekend events. Now those same families can become co-owners through equity crowdfunding.
headline: From customers to co-owners
description: The families who collect from our Brookvale hub are joining our equity crowdfunding campaign. Not financial advice.
